title: scutellaria muriculata
intro: Scutellaria muriculata, also known as Huang-qin, is a plant species in the genus Scutellaria, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria muriculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cardiovascular diseases. It is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
